title: sonchus bulbosus
intro: Sonchus bulbosus, also known as globular sow thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family, with its characteristic globular inflorescences and edible roots. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sonchus bulbosus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Sonchus bulbosus are often dried and used as a tea or tincture, or they can be consumed raw or cooked as a vegetable.
